description: Address code review findings: fix OIDC discovery URL, add JWKS cache invalidation retry, and fix authorizer sourceArn permission
steps: Fix OIDC discovery URL in src/lambda/rest-api.jwt-authorizer.ts: change '${discoveryUri}/.well-known' to '${discoveryUri}/.well-known/openid-configuration'
Add JWKS cache-bust retry mechanism in src/lambda/rest-api.jwt-authorizer.ts: when verification fails with a signature error, clear cacheKeys and retry once
Fix authorizer sourceArn in src/constructs/rest-api.ts: move the authorizer Lambda invoke permission to after SpecRestApi is created, using this.api.arnForExecuteApi()
acceptance_criteria: OIDC discovery URL uses the standard /.well-known/openid-configuration path
JWKS cache is cleared and verification retried when a signature error occurs
Authorizer Lambda invoke permission uses this.api.arnForExecuteApi() instead of this.node.addr
